markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Re-engage on a potential content partnership with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Two-Phase Partnership:** A $20k Phase 1 strategy sprint (10 articles, audits) validates quality before a $10k/mo Phase 2 daily publishing cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [**Dual-Purpose Strategy:** Content is optimized for both traditional SEO (keywords) and AI search (audience-centric authority) to maximize visibility and high-converting clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [**Geographic Customization:** Content strategy adapts for markets like France/Germany with custom personas, not just translation.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
  - [**Full-Service Execution:** GrowthX handles writing, AI-generated visuals, and publishing directly to Contentful after client review.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Goals & Scope

  - [**Strategic Reset:** Re-evaluate SEO and content strategy post-acquisition.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [**Content Scaling:** Increase output while balancing SEO and AI search optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [**Internationalization:** Improve non-English content strategy beyond simple translation.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Scope:** Blog and resource content; Pier 39's team retains product/use case pages.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

### GrowthX's Two-Phase Approach

  - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint ($20k)**](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [**Goal:** Validate quality and roadmap before committing to a full partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [**Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
          - [**Artifacts:** Voice/tone guides, competitor analysis, topic clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
          - [**Content:** 10 articles to demonstrate quality.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
          - [**Roadmap:** 12-month content plan.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Artifacts serve as internal resources and as "context engineering" for GrowthX's AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Daily Publishing ($10k/mo)**](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [**Goal:** Execute the Phase 1 roadmap at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [**Cadence:** \~20 articles/month, a mix of net-new and refreshes based on potential ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX drafts → Pier 39 reviews → GrowthX publishes to Contentful.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)

### AI Search & SEO Strategy

  - [**Dual Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
      - [**SEO:** Keyword analysis (volume, difficulty) to outrank competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
      - [**AI Search:** Audience-centric authority building to appear in AI answers.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [**Content Structure:** Optimized for AI with clear headings, FAQs, and listicles.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [**Measurement:**](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
      - [**Tool:** Scrunch dashboard for tracking citations and presence.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
      - [**Metrics:** Prompts cited, citation sessions, clicks from AI search.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
      - [**Rationale:** AI clicks convert at 0.4x the rate of traditional search, making them a high-value target.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)

### International & Visual Content

  - [**Geographic Strategy (France, Germany):**](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
      - [**Approach:** Custom personas and use cases for each market, not just translation.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)
      - [**Status:** GrowthX to confirm translation process and "one article, three versions" cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [**Rich Media:**](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
      - [**Inclusion:** AI-generated cover images and infographics are standard.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
      - [**Process:** AI generates options from brand guidelines → editor selects → client reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
      - [Confirm original pricing ($20k Phase 1, $10k/mo Phase 2) is still valid.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
      - [Clarify international content process (translation tools, "one article, three versions" cadence).](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [**Pier 39:**](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
      - [Make a partnership decision by the end of November.](https://fathom.video/share/dtmGUmbTnsVR68Gr6XVdcVfG5x4dHQ_Y?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
